General.Name: Acme International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Acme International Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides design and build solutions for building maintenance unit (BMU) system works Hong Kong, Macau, New Zealand, and internationally. Its activities include design, preparation of shop drawings and structural calculations, procurement of building materials and BMU systems, installation and logistics arrangement services, on-site project supervision, post-completion maintenance services, and project management services. It also develops, designs, produces, and sells new energy generation and energy storage system. In addition, the company provides services from sales of electricity; provision of electricity trading services; solar energy generation system consulting services; and professional technical services for renewable energy solutions. Acme International Holdings Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
General.Address: West Tower, Shun Tak Centre, Central, Hong Kong, 168-200
